capabilities.title: GPT Image 2 AI Image Generation Capabilities
capabilities.description: Built on OpenAI's advanced language model foundation, GPT Image 2 delivers superior prompt understanding, photorealistic output, and versatile creative control for both text-to-image and image-to-image workflows.

items.title: Text to Image Generation
items.description: Describe your vision in natural language and the model renders it with remarkable accuracy. GPT Image 2 excels at interpreting complex, multi-element prompts that other models struggle with.

items.title: Image to Image Editing
items.description: Upload a reference photo and guide the transformation with a text instruction. The model preserves context and style while applying your requested changes seamlessly.

items.title: Advanced Prompt Understanding
items.description: Powered by OpenAI's language model, this generator understands nuanced descriptions, spatial relationships, and artistic styles - producing outputs that closely match your intent.

items.title: Photorealistic Quality
items.description: Every generated image features accurate lighting, fine textures, and strong compositional balance. Ideal for product mockups, concept art, social media visuals, and creative projects.

faq.title: GPT Image 2 AI Image Generator FAQ
faq.description: Common questions about using GPT Image 2 for AI image generation on our platform.

items.question: What is GPT Image 2?
items.answer: GPT Image 2 is OpenAI's latest image generation model. It supports both text-to-image and image-to-image creation, combining strong language understanding with high-fidelity visual synthesis to produce photorealistic and creative outputs.

items.question: Can I use GPT Image 2 for free?
items.answer: Yes. New users receive free credits on sign-up, which can be used to generate images with this model immediately. No credit card is required to get started.

items.question: How many credits does it cost per image?
items.answer: Each generation costs 3 credits, making it one of the most affordable high-quality options available on the platform.

items.question: How does GPT Image 2 compare to other image models?
items.answer: Compared to models like Nano Banana, GPT Image 2 offers stronger prompt adherence and more accurate rendering of complex scenes. It is particularly well-suited for detailed, instruction-heavy prompts where precision matters.

cta.title: Start Generating AI Images with GPT Image 2 Free
